# GuttyKreum — The Japan Collection: Japanese City (Free Version)

- Source: https://guttykreum.itch.io/free-japanese-city-game-assets
- Creator: GuttyKreum
- Retrieved: 2026-07-19
- Package: `GuttyKreum_JapaneseCity_Freev1.zip`
- Contents: 379 static 32×32 PNG tiles, combined tilemap and preview images.
- Intended project use: streets, sidewalks, vending machines, plants, utility props and selected storefront parts. Do not redistribute the raw package.

## License summary

The creator's product page permits using the asset and derivative works in monetized and non-monetized media products, including commercial products. It prohibits using the asset in a logo or trademark, redistributing or sublicensing the asset outside the resulting media product, and allowing end users to extract it for use outside that product.

The product page is the authoritative license text. This summary is retained for project auditing and is not a substitute for that text.

## Integration note

This package is not CC0. Raw source files remain under `godot/assets/vendor/` and must not be exposed as a separately downloadable asset bundle. Credits should include “Japanese City tiles by GuttyKreum” even though the displayed license excerpt does not explicitly require attribution.
